about.title: About Sri Lanka Tours Driver
about.label: About Us
about.heading: We Help You
about.desc1: A smiling sun all year round, golden beaches, ancient cities, safaris, lovely people in a tropical paradise — Sri Lanka offers an unforgettable travelling experience you can ever imagine. We are a licensed tour guide team based in Colombo.
about.desc2: With over a decade of experience, we craft private, personalized journeys that connect you with the real heart of Sri Lanka.

destinationPage.speakToSpecialist: Speak to our Sri Lanka specialists

old-parliament-building.title: Old Parliament Building
old-parliament-building.description: The Old Parliament Building, completed in 1930, is a stunning Neo-Baroque structure that served as Sri Lanka's legislature for 53 years. It now houses the Presidential Secretariat.

jami-ul-alfar-mosque.title: Jami Ul-Alfar Mosque
jami-ul-alfar-mosque.description: Famed for its striking red and white candy-striped brick facade, the Red Mosque is a long-standing landmark in Pettah.

colombo-city.title: Colombo City
colombo-city.description: Colombo is Sri Lanka's commercial capital blending colonial heritage, modern skyscrapers, and vibrant nightlife.

gangaramaya-temple.title: Gangaramaya Temple
gangaramaya-temple.description: One of the oldest Buddhist temples in Colombo, today it serves as a temple, cultural and educational center.

galle-face-green.title: Galle Face Green
galle-face-green.description: A popular ocean-side park known for sunset views and street food stalls.

kelaniya-raja-maha-viharaya.title: Kelaniya Raja Maha Viharaya
kelaniya-raja-maha-viharaya.description: A historic Buddhist temple believed to have been visited by Lord Buddha.

yala-national-park.title: Yala National Park
yala-national-park.description: Famous for one of the highest concentrations of leopards in the world.

st-marys-church-negombo.title: St Marys Church Negombo
st-marys-church-negombo.description: One of the largest cathedrals in Sri Lanka, known for beautiful ceiling paintings.
